name: Composio Direct
description: Direct access to 1000+ Composio automation tools plus v3 toolkits, files, triggers, webhooks, connection reuse, and meta-tools without MCP transport

tools.name: composio_search_tools
tools.description: Search for Composio tool_slug values by query, toolkit name, or description

tools.name: composio_get_tool_schemas
tools.description: Fetch Composio input and output schemas for one or more tool_slug values

tools.name: composio_execute_tool
tools.description: Execute a single Composio tool_slug with given parameters

tools.name: composio_multi_execute
tools.description: Execute multiple Composio tool_slug values in parallel or sequentially

tools.name: composio_auth_link
tools.description: Get an OAuth authorization link for a Composio-connected service (GitHub, Gmail, Slack, etc.)

tools.name: composio_list_connections
tools.description: List Composio connected accounts for the current user with optional filters

tools.name: composio_get_connection
tools.description: Get one Composio connected account by connected_account_id

tools.name: composio_list_toolkits
tools.description: List Composio toolkits with auth and capability metadata

tools.name: composio_get_toolkit
tools.description: Get one Composio toolkit by slug

tools.name: composio_list_files
tools.description: List files registered through the Composio Files API

tools.name: composio_request_file_upload
tools.description: Request a presigned Composio file upload URL

tools.name: composio_list_trigger_types
tools.description: List Composio trigger type schemas

tools.name: composio_get_trigger_type
tools.description: Get one Composio trigger type schema

tools.name: composio_list_triggers
tools.description: List Composio trigger instances for the current user

tools.name: composio_upsert_trigger
tools.description: Create or update a Composio trigger instance

tools.name: composio_set_trigger_status
tools.description: Enable or disable a Composio trigger instance

tools.name: composio_delete_trigger
tools.description: Delete a Composio trigger instance

tools.name: composio_list_webhook_events
tools.description: List Composio webhook event types

tools.name: composio_list_webhooks
tools.description: List Composio webhook subscriptions

tools.name: composio_get_webhook
tools.description: Get one Composio webhook subscription

tools.name: composio_create_webhook
tools.description: Create a Composio webhook subscription

tools.name: composio_update_webhook
tools.description: Update a Composio webhook subscription

tools.name: composio_rotate_webhook_secret
tools.description: Rotate a Composio webhook signing secret

tools.name: composio_delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a Composio webhook subscription

tools.name: composio_manage_connections
tools.description: Run Composio manage_connections meta-tool for toolkit auth flows

tools.name: composio_remote_bash
tools.description: Run Composio remote_bash_tool through the execute endpoint

tools.name: composio_remote_workbench
tools.description: Run Composio remote_workbench through the execute endpoint
